description: Golden reference outputs from the ORIGINAL spooncuber 3BLD lettering engine (assets/js/reader.js + codetrans.js + min2phase.js), run in Node under a DOM shim. Use to verify the TS port. Each entry is self-describing (input + config + expected output).

readCode.note: edgeread/cornerread return HTML. tokens[] is one entry per letter in order (spaces dropped); role from span color (blue=start, green=end, bare=normal). plain = letters joined. spaced = markup-stripped with spaces preserved. raw = original HTML. edgeorientation/cornerorientation are plain pair strings.

faceletBuild.note: m2p() builds this URFDLB facelet string then solves it. Only the facelet is portable/deterministic; the solver move output is NOT recorded. solvableSanityCheck confirms min2phase accepts the captured facelet.

randomGenerators.note: randomEdge/randomCorner/randomEdge1/randomCorner1 use Math.random (non- seedable). Outputs are NOT captured. The port's tests assert INVARIANTS instead (see invariants).

randomEdge: Corner block (0..23) unchanged === globalState[0..23] (only edge stickers permuted).
Edge piece permutation parity === parity argument (0=even via 24 swaps, 1=odd via 25 swaps).
Result is a valid 12-edge permutation (each of the 12 edge positions present once when read by posChichu).
randomEdge1: Buffer (codeList[0]'s position, here pos0 = first non-excluded edge pos) is the only fixed exchange anchor.
All codes in codeList stay in place (their positions are excluded from the shuffle pool, never displaced).
Permutation parity === parity argument relative to the working subset.
randomCorner1: Codes in codeList stay in place (excluded from shuffle pool).
